name: eduID Credential
description: A verifiable credential for educational identity, based on PID Rulebook (ARF Annex 3.01). Provides identity attributes sourced from the eduID SAML2 IdP for students and staff within the education and research sector.

display.label: Last name
display.description: Current last name(s) or surname(s). Sourced from SAML attribute sn.

display.label: First name
display.description: Current first name(s), including middle name(s) if applicable. Sourced from SAML attribute givenName.

display.label: Legal name
display.description: Full legal name. Sourced from SAML attribute norEduPersonLegalName.

display.label: Date of birth
display.description: Full birth date (day, month, year). Sourced from SAML attribute schacDateOfBirth.

display.label: Nationalities
display.description: Country or countries as ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 codes. Sourced from SAML attribute c (alpha-2) or co (country name, converted to alpha-2).

display.label: Nationality
display.description: Country of nationality as ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code.

display.label: Personal ID
display.description: Swedish personal identity number (personnummer). Sourced from SAML attribute personalIdentityNumber.

display.label: Email
display.description: Person's email address. Sourced from SAML attribute mail.

display.label: Username
display.description: Preferred username or principal name. Sourced from SAML attribute eduPersonPrincipalName (eppn).

display.label: Assurance
display.description: Identity assurance level URIs. Sourced from SAML attribute eduPersonAssurance.

display.label: Expiry date
display.description: End date of the document's validity.

display.label: Issuing authority
display.description: Name of the issuing body or country.

display.label: Issuing country
display.description: Country where the document was issued, as an ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code.

display.label: Issue date
display.description: Start date of the document's validity.

display.label: Trust anchor
display.description: The trust anchor used to verify the document.
